units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex, essential for any hands-on learning path.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for hands-on Apex development, as they represent Salesforce records for data interaction.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on hands-on DML operations, directly addressing the 'hands-on Apex' intent by teaching data modification.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Learning to write SOQL queries is a fundamental hands-on Apex skill for retrieving specific data from the database.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit provides hands-on experience with SOSL, offering another powerful method for searching data in Apex.
